category_sources: source_facts.description says IRC and ICB client; source_facts.executables include irc and related client tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ircii; the project is commonly styled ircII, while package and source URLs use ircii.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official homepage fallback; official source distribution directory at ircii.warped.com exposes current release files and source tree.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage/source distribution does not identify an official source-control repository, only release archives and current source directory.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IRC and ICB client; source_facts.executables list irc, ircbug, and ircflush.
